popularStory.headline: John Peabody Notes
popularStory.description: ohn Peabody was in Newport, RI, in 1649 when he bought land. He was a carpenter. Some sources say his first wife was Dorothy Tooley/Tully, but Dean Smith argues against this in The ancestry of Eva Bel …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Peabody於1612年出生在英國時，他的父親Ebenezer James Peabody31歲，母親Sarah Pearle28歲。他於大約1640年與Dorothy Tooley結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1687年6月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特享年75歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Peabody于1612年出生在英国时，他的父亲Ebenezer James Peabody31岁，母亲Sarah Pearle28岁。他于大约1640年与Dorothy Tooley结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1687年6月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特享年75岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特。

nameMeanings.name: Peabody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname ‘peacock-body’, from Middle English pe, pey, pay (Old English pēa) ‘peacock’ + body, perhaps for a vain person who dressed ostentatiously. Compare Pea , Peacock .

History: The prominent financier and philanthropist George Peabody was born 1795 in South Danvers, now Peabody, MA. His first ancestor in America was Francis Peabody, who emigrated from England in 1635 and settled at Topsfield, MA.

variants.name: Pea
meanings: nickname from Middle English pa(we), po(we) ‘peacock’ (Old English pāwa and Old Norse pá). See Peacock . Alternatively, from the Middle English personal name Pawe (Old English Pāwa), Latinized as Pavo, and derived from the nickname.
from the Middle English personal name Paw(e), a pet form of Paulin or occasionally Paul. See Pawson , Paulin .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Peabody was born in 1612, in England, his father, Ebenezer James Peabody, was 31 and his mother, Sarah Pearle, was 28. He married Dorothy Tooley about 1640. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. He died on 22 June 1687, in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 75, and was buried in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Peabody est né en 1612, à Angleterre, son père, Ebenezer James Peabody, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sarah Pearle, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Tooley environ 1640. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 22 juin 1687, à Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Juni 1687 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Peabody è nato il nel 1612 nel England, il suo padre, Ebenezer James Peabody, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Pearle, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Tooley circa 1640. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì il 22 giugno 1687, nel Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Peabodyが1612年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Ebenezer James Peabodyは31歳，母Sarah Pearleは28歳であった。約1640年にDorothy Tooleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1687年6月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトで75歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Peabody(이)가 1612년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebenezer James Peabody(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Pearle(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1640년 Dorothy Tooley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1687년 6월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Peabody nasceu em 1612, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Ebenezer James Peabody, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Pearle, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Tooley aproximadamente 1640. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de junho de 1687, em Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Peabody родился в 1612 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Ebenezer James Peabody было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Pearle, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Tooley около 1640 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Он умер 22 июня 1687 г. в местности нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Peabody nació en 1612, en Inglaterra, su papá, Ebenezer James Peabody, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sarah Pearle, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Dorothy Tooley aproximadamente 1640. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió el 22 de junio de 1687, en Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
